SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,431.00 FILED BY HAMMOND, CURTIS DEAN AS TO DEFENDANT WISKIND, ISABEL CITYWIDE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-02-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMMOND, CURTIS DEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WISKIND, ISABEL CITYWIDE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. DBA CITYWIDE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CITYWIDE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $3,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,190.00, DEFENDANT WISKIND'S WASHING MACHINE CAUSED THE DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S UNIT, WHICH WAS PARTLY UNINHABITABLE BECAUSE IT LACKED A KITCHEN FOR APPROXIMATELY 2 MONTHS. WISKIND SHALL PAY $3100. PLAINTIFF TAKES NOTHING FROM THE REMAINING DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,431.00 FILED BY HAMMOND, CURTIS DEAN AS TO DEFENDANT WISKIND, ISABEL CITYWIDE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. DBA CITYWIDE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
